name: slot-art-creator-node-mcp
description: Node.js MCP server for slot-art-creator — exposes nb2_generate, nb2_edit, nb2_upscale, and nb2_smart_resize tools. Generation tools prefer Google Gemini (Nano Banana 2) when available, fall back to fal.ai. nb2_smart_resize prefers fal.ai (purpose-built endpoint via nano-banana-pro) and falls back to a Gemini implementation (NB2 + pngjs center-crop) when only Gemini is available.
